talks.title: Opening Keynote: The State of Open Source AI
talks.abstract: Keynote addressing emerging trends in open source AI, LLMs, and community-driven development.

talks.title: LLMs in Production: Optimization Strategies
talks.abstract: Deep dive into production optimization techniques for large language models, including quantization, caching, and inference optimization.

talks.title: Rust in High-Performance Systems
talks.abstract: Exploring Rust's advantages for building performant systems, zero-cost abstractions, and memory safety guarantees.

talks.title: Advanced Performance Profiling Techniques
talks.abstract: Advanced techniques for profiling applications, identifying bottlenecks, and optimizing performance at scale.

talks.title: CI/CD Pipeline Automation at Scale
talks.abstract: Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines that scale to large organizations, with focus on automation and reliability.

talks.title: Agent Architectures for Autonomous Systems
talks.abstract: Designing autonomous agent systems with modern AI frameworks, discussing agentic architectures and real-world applications.

talks.title: Memory Safety in Concurrent Programs
talks.abstract: Leveraging Rust's type system to ensure memory safety in concurrent and parallel programs without garbage collection.

talks.title: GPU Computing with CUDA and ROCm
talks.abstract: GPU computing fundamentals with CUDA and open-source ROCm stack for high-performance computation.
talks.track: HPC, Big Data, and Data Science

talks.title: Lightning Talks: AI & ML Edition
talks.abstract: Fast-paced lightning talks covering cutting-edge developments in AI and machine learning.

talks.title: Async I/O Patterns in Modern Languages
talks.abstract: Exploring async/await, goroutines, and modern I/O patterns in Go and other contemporary languages.

talks.title: Database Query Optimization Deep Dive
talks.abstract: Query optimization techniques, indexing strategies, and profiling tools for modern database systems.

talks.title: Observability in Distributed Systems
talks.abstract: Implementing comprehensive observability for distributed systems using modern tools and open standards like OpenTelemetry.

talks.title: Open Source Compliance and Licensing
talks.abstract: Understanding open source licenses, compliance requirements, and best practices for sustainable FOSS projects.

talks.title: Zero-Copy Protocols in Rust
talks.abstract: Building high-performance zero-copy networking protocols in Rust with guaranteed memory safety.

talks.title: Kubernetes at the Edge
talks.abstract: Deploying and managing Kubernetes clusters at the edge, addressing unique challenges of distributed edge computing.

talks.title: Closing Keynote: Open Source in 2026
talks.abstract: Panel discussion on the future of open source, challenges, opportunities, and community building in 2026.

talks.title: WebAssembly: The Next Frontier
talks.abstract: Exploring WebAssembly capabilities for browser and server-side computing, with real-world examples.

talks.title: Secure Enclaves and Confidential Computing
talks.abstract: Deep dive into TEEs, confidential computing, and hardware-backed security for protecting sensitive workloads.

talks.title: Container Runtimes: Past, Present, and Future
talks.abstract: Overview of container runtime evolution, comparison of options like Docker, containerd, and alternatives.

talks.title: Rust for Embedded Systems
talks.abstract: Using Rust to develop safe and efficient embedded systems, from microcontrollers to IoT devices.
